Minis are tiny models of your favorite monsters and characters from the world of Tyria. Each mini can be activated from your inventory to follow you around the world.
Minister Caudecus is not at home as repairs are being made to his manor. However, something is afoot.
Minister Caudecus,There's been a development of sorts. Those filthy Jackdaws claimed to have Demmi, but when we went to "liberate" the girl, someone had already absconded with her.

Minister Kent Duran is Kryta's ambassador to the Ebonhawke treaty negotiation. His recommendation was that we use our information on Ajax's attack to our advantage; set an ambush at Summit Peak, and be ready for the renegades when they attack.
Minister Li has retreated to his personal arena. Use the zip line to engage him!
Minister Li, head of Cantha's Ministry of Security, has ordered your squad to be apprehended on dubious charges. Fight your way out of the ambush so you can prove your innocence.

Minister Taelin. Minister Taelin of the Ministry of Archives.Ohn was found dead in the Undercity of Kaineng during the rescue efforts, which makes me the only other living member of the Ministry of Archives.We couldn't get very far into the wreckage; the entire sector is completely flooded—destroyed. A few survivors were found in the buildings on the upper portions of the market, but everyone below... Every now and then another body will float to the top. I don't know if we'll ever truly know the death count.Rather than restore the Undercity, Jimin wants to seal it off. With the Risen pouring out from the north, it's only a matter of time before the dead begin to stir here, too.~~Researcher~~ Minister Doh Taelin, Ministry of Archives, 1729 CC

Minister Zamon stands accused of treason. Logan Thackeray and the prosecution must present strong evidence and unshakeable witnesses or risk going to prison themselves for slandering a respected minister.

Minister Zamon, a respected and powerful official in Divinity's Reach, is suspected of aiding the bandits. Logan Thackeray needs more evidence before he can accuse Zamon, so a plan has been hatched to collect more information at a dinner party packed with Zamon's peers.
Minister,It would seem the Ringmaster was foiled, and he managed to lose the Floating Grizwhirl in the process! I suppose you were correct, and that a more "direct" approach is necessary.

Ministers,Let it be known that all charges against Minister Arton in regards to the tragic loss of Falcon Company have been cleared, in light of new evidence verified by Captain Thackeray of the Seraph.

Minotaurs have been behaving even more aggressively than usual, attacking norn caravans. Someone needs to find out what's going on and put a stop to it.
Minster Caudecus, Lord Beetlestone, is hosting a party for celebrate the charr/human detente. Her majesty, Queen Jennah, will be attending.

Mirai, there's not enough time to beg for your forgiveness, and I don't deserve it anyway. I should've been better.
Miscellaneous cosmetics on sale this week!
Mischievous Ferret warclaw skin now available!

Miss Trin, Horrik is doing a good job at keeping the pirates from killing the Inquest, but Ivan is scared that we're one accident away from a full-on revolution (and trust Ivan, you don't want to clean that up).  The Inquest are pretty bossy, and they talk often about our "beef-witted malcontent." Ivan doesn't know what that is, but it doesn't sound especially nice. Maybe we should arrange an icebreaker event with our companions. I'm sure the Inquest will be singing a different song after trying Ivan's omnomberry pie.  —Ivan

Mists-Grasper's previously reported endurance of Mists phenomena is a side effect of their enchantment and design. Sorcerous analysis suggests that the gloves were crafted as manipulation tools for the Mists environment—a means to touch the building blocks of creation. If functioning as intended, they could draw in samples of Mists matter for later release.I speculate that this may have been for research purposes, but in the current environment and depths that the wayfinder is known to explore, it presents a significant combat option. Bluntly, to store and later deploy Mists-pocket reality-dissonance (colloquially "Agony"*). I admit, the idea of cutting a foe to bits with the edge a collapsing reality is a romantic one.—Field Archivist Cierle*Debates on the relationship between the Fractal phenomena and the mursaat's weaponized Spectral Agony are many, and they are outside the scope of this report. I don't need Isgarren breathing down my neck for referencing sealed records.
